attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTION_ID, 
     COALESCE(CXOA.LINE_REF_NUMBER,-999), 
     COALESCE(CXOA.DATA_SOURCE,'UNK'), 
     CXOA.TRX_ID, 
     CXOA.PARENT_TRX_ID, 
    COALESCE(CXOA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,-999), 
     COALESCE(CXOA.ATTRIBUTION_FLAG,'N'), 
     CXOA.BUNDLE_TYPE, 
     COALESCE(CXOA.QUANTITY,0), 
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_LIST_PRICE, 
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE, 
     CXOA.RECOGNIZED_PCT, 
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_PCT, 
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE, 
     'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
     CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATE_DATETIME,      
     CXOA.EXCEPTION_CODE,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_EXT_LIST_PRICE ,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_EXT_NET_PRICE ,
     CXOA.WEB_ORDER_ID,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_SALES_VALUE,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_MRR,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_IMRR,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_ARR,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_NRR,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_IARR,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_IMYARR,
     CXOA.TCV,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE,
     CXOA.LINKED_ATTRIB_ID,
     CXOA.EXCEPTION_DETAIL, 
     CXOA.ENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
   CXOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID     , 
   CXOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID        ,     
   CXOA.MULTI_OA_BUNDLE_ENABLED  ,     
   CXOA.ATTRIBUTION_DETAILS      ,
     CXOA.PARENT_LINE_REF_NUMBER,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_ITEM,
     CXOA.RECOGNIZED_ATTR_SALES_VALUES,
     CXOA.RECOGNIZED_ATTR_TCV,
     CXOA.BOOKING_VERSION,
     CXOA.ERP_LINE_ID,
     CXOA.ERP_PARENT_LINE_ID,
     cast(cast(CREATION_DATE  as varchar(19)) as timestamp(0)),
     EDW_CREATE_DTM,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_PCT as ACV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
     CXOA.PRICING_TERM,        /* SIGORANT ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY19 */
	 CXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE,
	 CXOA.ACCOUNTING_DURATION
   FROM
      $$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_XXOA_ORDER_ATTRIB CXOA
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ATTRIBUTION_ID ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DTM  DESC)=1
      WHERE   
      --SOURCE_DML_TYPE IN ( 'SQL COMPUPDATE','INSERT')
       --AND PUBLISH_FLAG='Y'
       DATA_SOURCE IN ('SBP')
       AND EDW_CREATE_DTM >= '$$LastExtractDate' 
	   
	   UNION ALL
	   
	   SELECT 
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTION_ID, 
     COALESCE(CXOA.LINE_REF_NUMBER,-999), 
     COALESCE(CXOA.DATA_SOURCE,'UNK'), 
     CXOA.TRX_ID, 
     CXOA.PARENT_TRX_ID, 
    COALESCE(CXOA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,-999), 
     COALESCE(CXOA.ATTRIBUTION_FLAG,'N'), 
     CXOA.BUNDLE_TYPE, 
     COALESCE(CXOA.QUANTITY,0), 
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_LIST_PRICE, 
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE, 
     CXOA.RECOGNIZED_PCT, 
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_PCT, 
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE, 
     'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
     CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
     CXOA.EXCEPTION_CODE,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_EXT_LIST_PRICE ,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_EXT_NET_PRICE ,
     CXOA.WEB_ORDER_ID,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_SALES_VALUE,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_MRR,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_IMRR,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_ARR,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_NRR,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_IARR,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_IMYARR,
     CXOA.TCV,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE,
     CXOA.LINKED_ATTRIB_ID,
     CXOA.EXCEPTION_DETAIL, 
     CXOA.ENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
   CXOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID     , 
   CXOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID        ,     
   CXOA.MULTI_OA_BUNDLE_ENABLED  ,     
   CXOA.ATTRIBUTION_DETAILS      ,
     CXOA.PARENT_LINE_REF_NUMBER,
     CXOA.ATTRIBUTED_ITEM,
     CXOA.RECOGNIZED_ATTR_SALES_VALUES,
     CXOA.RECOGNIZED_ATTR_TCV,
     CXOA.BOOKING_VERSION,
     CXOA.ERP_LINE_ID,
     CXOA.ERP_PARENT_LINE_ID,
     cast(cast(CREATION_DATE  as varchar(19)) as timestamp(0)),
     EDW_CREATE_DTM,
     ACV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
     CXOA.PRICING_TERM,         /* SIGORANT ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY19 */
	 CXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE,
	 CXOA.ACCOUNTING_DURATION
     FROM
     $$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_XXOA_ORDER_ATTRIB CXOA
     QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ATTRIBUTION_ID ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1
     WHERE   
     --SOURCE_DML_TYPE IN ( 'SQL COMPUPDATE','INSERT')
      --AND PUBLISH_FLAG='Y'
       DATA_SOURCE IN ('TSL','NGCCRM')  
      --AND TRX_USAGE_CODE='R' AND  TRX_TYPE_CODE='B'
      AND EDW_CREATE_DTM  >= '$$LastExtractDate'
     /* 
	 AND EDW_CREATE_DTM  <=(  --Incremental Extraction based on 9 TO 9 Logic 
          SELECT 
           CASE 
           WHEN A.DAY_MAX_SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME IS NULL THEN NULL
     WHEN A.NEXT_DAY_SRC_COMMIT_TIME IS NOT NULL AND A.CNT <> 0 THEN B.PROCESS_END_DTM
           WHEN  A.DAY_MAX_SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <B.PROCESS_END_DTM  
           THEN A.DAY_MAX_SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME 
           ELSE B.PROCESS_END_DTM  
           END  END_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE
          FROM $$NRTSTGDB.ST_XAAS_BKG_INCR_DT_CTRL_NRT A,
               $$ETLVWDB.EL_XAAS_BKG_PRCS_DT_CTRL_NRT B
          WHERE A.JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_ST_XAAS_XXOA_ORDER_ATTRIB_NRT'
          AND B.SS_CD='XAAS')  */

SELECT 
OA_ATTRIB.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
OA_ATTRIB.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE,
OA_ATTRIB.PRODUCT_KEY,
OA_ATTRIB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
OA_ATTRIB.LINE_REF_NUMBER,
OA_ATTRIB.PARENT_LINE_REF_NUMBER,
OA_ATTRIB.ACCOUNTING_RULE ,
OA_ATTRIB.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
OA_ATTRIB.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
OA_ATTRIB.EDW_CREATE_USER,
OA_ATTRIB.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
OA_ATTRIB.EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM
(SELECT 
 TRX.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID   ,
 TRX.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE AS SUBSCRIPTION_CODE  ,
 NP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
 NP1.ITEM_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 CAST(-999 AS VARCHAR(240)) AS LINE_REF_NUMBER,
 CAST( -999 AS VARCHAR(240)) AS PARENT_LINE_REF_NUMBER,
 OA.ACCOUNTING_RULE AS ACCOUNTING_RULE ,
 OA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
  OA.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_XXOPL_ORD_ATTRIB_AC_RULE OA
 INNER JOIN (SELECT SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID, SUBSCRIPTION_CODE, TRX_ID, INVENTORY_ITEM_ID , LINE_ID  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_BOOKING_TRANSACTIONS
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TRX_ID ORDER BY EDW_UPDATETIME DESC)=1
 )TRX
 ON TRX.TRX_ID=OA.PARENT_TRX_ID
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT      =OA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID  
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
 ON NP1.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT      =TRX.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID  
 WHERE DATA_SOURCE IN ('TSL','NGCCRM')
 AND ATTRIBUTION_CODE='ATTRIBUTED SUB SKU'
 AND ACCOUNTING_RULE IS NOT NULL
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRX.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID   ,TRX.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE  , NP.ITEM_KEY, NP1.ITEM_KEY ORDER BY OA.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1
   
   UNION

SELECT 
 TRX.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID   ,
 TRX.SUBSCRIPTION_ID  SUBSCRIPTION_CODE,
 NP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
 NP1.ITEM_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 OA.LINE_REF_NUMBER ,
 OA.PARENT_LINE_REF_NUMBER ,
 OA.ACCOUNTING_RULE AS ACCOUNTING_RULE ,
 OA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
 OA.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER                  
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_XXOPL_ORD_ATTRIB_AC_RULE OA
 INNER JOIN (SELECT SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID, SUBSCRIPTION_ID, LINE_REF_NUMBER, ORDERED_ITEM, LINE_ID FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY LINE_REF_NUMBER ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
 )TRX
 ON TRX.LINE_REF_NUMBER = OA.PARENT_LINE_REF_NUMBER        
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT  = OA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID  
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
 ON NP1.BK_PRODUCT_ID = TRX.ORDERED_ITEM
 WHERE DATA_SOURCE IN ('SBP')
 AND ATTRIBUTION_CODE = 'ATTRIBUTED SUB SKU'
 AND ACCOUNTING_RULE IS NOT NULL
/* AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM  STGDB.WI_XXOPL_ATTRIB_AC_RULE ST WHERE ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID  = TRX.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID   AND
 ST.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE = TRX.SUBSCRIPTION_ID  AND ST.PRODUCT_KEY= NP.ITEM_KEY AND ST.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = NP1.ITEM_KEY)*/
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRX.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID   ,TRX.SUBSCRIPTION_ID  , NP.ITEM_KEY, NP1.ITEM_KEY ORDER BY OA.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1) OA_ATTRIB
  
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY OA_ATTRIB.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID   ,OA_ATTRIB.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE  , OA_ATTRIB.PRODUCT_KEY, OA_ATTRIB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ORDER BY OA_ATTRIB.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1
